title: Witless Additions
description: A simple mod which adds optional additions such as easier axolotl breeding, removing "too expensive" from anvils, chainstone and more!
body:
**_Witless Additions_** is a Fabric mod that adds a collection of quality of life tweaks and gameplay improvements. Each feature is individually toggleable via the world creation screen or in-game commands, letting you tailor the experience to your preferences without installing multiple mods.
Current Modules

- Improved Anvils — Removes the "Too Expensive" cap so items can always be repaired regardless of prior work penalty.
- Expanded Axolotl Food — Breed axolotls with salmon or tropical fish items, not just tropical fish buckets.
- Mineable Spawners — Mine spawners with a Silk Touch pickaxe. Drops a spawn egg matching the spawner's mob.
- Improved Deepslate Mining — Deepslate mines slightly faster with Netherite tools.
- Chainstone — Chains stick to blocks along their axis when moved by pistons.
- Silencing Stick — Shift-right-click a mob to silence it. Use again to restore its sounds.
- Improved Nametags — Rename a mob by shift-right-clicking it with a nametag. No anvil or experience required.
- Expanded Sniffer Discoveries — Sniffers can now dig up golden dandelions alongside their usual finds.

More modules are planned for future updates!
